info.name: Maisa QA Test — Worker Execution
info.description:
Reproduces exactly the API calls made by qa-test.py.

SSL: Disable SSL verification in Postman Settings → General → SSL certificate verification → OFF.

Fill in the collection variables before running:
  - base_url
  - cookie      (full cookie string)
  - wm_id       (Worker Manager ID, e.g. 6a2fad0818ecbc197d3c1214)
  - version_id  (lastVersionId from step 1 response — copy it into this variable before running step 2+)
  - exec_id     (executionId from step 2 response — copy it into this variable before running step 3)

Run in order: 1 → 2 → 3

variable.description: Full cookie string. E.g.: maisa_pro_sidebar_state=true; maisaai-session-id=...; AWSALBTG=...; AWSALBTGCORS=...
lastVersionId from step 1 response — fill this in before running step 2
executionId from step 2 response — fill this in before running step 3

item.name: Step 1 — Get Worker Manager (verify cookie + wm_id)

request.description:
Corresponds to get_worker_manager_by_id() in qa-test.py.

Verifies:
  - Cookie is valid (401 = bad cookie)
  - wm_id exists (404 = wrong ID)

From the response, copy data.lastVersionId into the 'version_id' collection variable before running step 2.

formdata.description: JSON array of input variables. Matches qa-dataset.json test-1 input.

request.description:
Corresponds to run_worker() in qa-test.py — first path tried: /workers/{version_id}/run.

If this returns 404 or 500, try the fallback request 'Step 2b' below.

From the response, copy data.executionId (or data.id) into the 'exec_id' collection variable before running step 3.

Corresponds to run_worker() fallback path in qa-test.py: /digital-worker/{wm_id}/run.

Use this if Step 2 fails. From the response, copy executionId into 'exec_id' before running step 3.

Corresponds to the polling loop in run_worker() in qa-test.py.

Run this repeatedly until data.status is one of: completed, failed, error.

The result is in data.result. qa-test.py checks:
  - match=not_empty  → result must not be empty
  - match=contains   → expected string must appear in result
  - match=exact      → result must equal expected string (case-insensitive)
